title: [BUG] stream.xlsx.WorkbookReader.parse() doesn't cleanup temporary files if not fully iterated
author: Turtlefight

comments.author: MZawadz1
comments.body:
Any update on the issue? I've just found myself wondering what's causing my fs space not being released, due to this bug 😬 
It would be good to at least mention that behaviour in docs next to [Streaming XLSX](https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs?tab=readme-ov-file#streaming-xlsx), especially given it happens using recommended async iteration, as this might not be obvious.
